verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus Asaph.   Deus, venerunt gentes in hæreditatem tuam ;  polluerunt templum sanctum tuum ;  posuerunt Jerusalem in pomorum custodiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֗וֹר לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֱֽלֹהִ֡ים בָּ֤אוּ גוֹיִ֨ם ׀ בְּֽנַחֲלָתֶ֗ךָ טִ֭מְּאוּ אֶת־הֵיכַ֣ל קׇדְשֶׁ֑ךָ שָׂ֖מוּ אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֣͏ִם לְעִיִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: O God, the heathen are come into thine inheritance; thy holy temple have they defiled; they have laid Jerusalem on heaps.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuerunt morticina servorum tuorum escas volatilibus cæli ;  carnes sanctorum tuorum bestiis terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָתְנ֡וּ אֶת־נִבְלַ֬ת עֲבָדֶ֗יךָ מַ֭אֲכָל לְע֣וֹף הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם בְּשַׂ֥ר חֲ֝סִידֶ֗יךָ לְחַיְתוֹ־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: The dead bodies of thy servants have they given to be meat unto the fowls of the heaven, the flesh of thy saints unto the beasts of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Effuderunt sanguinem eorum tamquam aquam in circuitu Jerusalem,  et non erat qui sepeliret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁפְכ֬וּ דָמָ֨ם ׀ כַּמַּ֗יִם סְֽבִ֘יב֤וֹת יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם וְאֵ֣ין קוֹבֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Their blood have they shed like water round about Jerusalem; and there was none to bury them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Facti sumus opprobrium vicinis nostris ;  subsannatio et illusio his qui in circuitu nostro sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָיִ֣ינוּ חֶ֭רְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנֵ֑ינוּ לַ֥עַג וָ֝קֶ֗לֶס לִסְבִיבוֹתֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: We are become a reproach to our neighbours, a scorn and derision to them that are round about us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo, Domine, irasceris in finem ?  accendetur velut ignis zelus tuus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה תֶּאֱנַ֣ף לָנֶ֑צַח תִּֽבְעַ֥ר כְּמוֹ־אֵ֝֗שׁ קִנְאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: How long, Lord? wilt thou be angry for ever? shall thy jealousy burn like fire?

verses.latin_vulgate: Effunde iram tuam in gentes quæ te non noverunt,  et in regna quæ nomen tuum non invocaverunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁפֹ֤ךְ חֲמָתְךָ֗ אֶֽל־הַגּוֹיִם֮ אֲשֶׁ֢ר לֹא־יְדָ֫ע֥וּךָ וְעַ֥ל מַמְלָכ֑וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּ֝שִׁמְךָ֗ לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.king_james: Pour out thy wrath upon the heathen that have not known thee, and upon the kingdoms that have not called upon thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia comederunt Jacob,  et locum ejus desolaverunt.
verses.king_james: For they have devoured Jacob, and laid waste his dwelling place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne memineris iniquitatum nostrarum antiquarum ;  cito anticipent nos misericordiæ tuæ,  quia pauperes facti sumus nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תִּזְכׇּר־לָנוּ֮ עֲוֺנֹ֢ת רִאשֹׁ֫נִ֥ים מַ֭הֵר יְקַדְּמ֣וּנוּ רַחֲמֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י דַלּ֣וֹנוּ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: O remember not against us former iniquities: let thy tender mercies speedily prevent us: for we are brought very low.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjuva nos, Deus salutaris noster,  et propter gloriam nominis tui, Domine, libera nos :  et propitius esto peccatis nostris, propter nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עׇזְרֵ֤נוּ ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י יִשְׁעֵ֗נוּ עַֽל־דְּבַ֥ר כְּבֽוֹד־שְׁמֶ֑ךָ וְהַצִּילֵ֥נוּ וְכַפֵּ֥ר עַל־חַ֝טֹּאתֵ֗ינוּ לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Help us, O God of our salvation, for the glory of thy name: and deliver us, and purge away our sins, for thy name’s sake.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne forte dicant in gentibus : Ubi est Deus eorum ?  et innotescat in nationibus coram oculis nostris  ultio sanguinis servorum tuorum qui effusus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֤מָּה ׀ יֹאמְר֣וּ הַגּוֹיִם֮ אַיֵּ֢ה אֱֽלֹהֵ֫יהֶ֥ם יִוָּדַ֣ע (בגיים) [בַּגּוֹיִ֣ם] לְעֵינֵ֑ינוּ נִ֝קְמַ֗ת דַּֽם־עֲבָדֶ֥יךָ הַשָּׁפֽוּךְ׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is their God? let him be known among the heathen in our sight by the revenging of the blood of thy servants which is shed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Introëat in conspectu tuo gemitus compeditorum ;  secundum magnitudinem brachii tui posside filios mortificatorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּ֤ב֣וֹא לְפָנֶיךָ֮ אֶנְקַ֢ת אָ֫סִ֥יר כְּגֹ֥דֶל זְרוֹעֲךָ֑ ה֝וֹתֵ֗ר בְּנֵ֣י תְמוּתָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Let the sighing of the prisoner come before thee; according to the greatness of thy power preserve thou those that are appointed to die;

verses.latin_vulgate: et redde vicinis nostris septuplum in sinu eorum ;  improperium ipsorum quod exprobraverunt tibi, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָ֘שֵׁ֤ב לִשְׁכֵנֵ֣ינוּ שִׁ֭בְעָתַיִם אֶל־חֵיקָ֑ם חֶרְפָּ֘תָ֤ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר חֵרְפ֣וּךָ אֲדֹנָֽי׃
verses.king_james: And render unto our neighbours sevenfold into their bosom their reproach, wherewith they have reproached thee, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nos autem populus tuus, et oves pascuæ tuæ,  confitebimur tibi in sæculum ;  in generationem et generationem annuntiabimus laudem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ עַמְּךָ֨ ׀ וְצֹ֥אן מַרְעִיתֶךָ֮ נ֤וֹדֶ֥ה לְּךָ֗ לְע֫וֹלָ֥ם לְד֥וֹר וָדֹ֑ר נְ֝סַפֵּ֗ר תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: So we thy people and sheep of thy pasture will give thee thanks for ever: we will shew forth thy praise to all generations.
